## **TZ3.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ3.3.1. ROMATSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ROMANIA TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 3 IN 2025**

ROMATSA reported a net loss of -1.5 M€, as a combination of a loss of -1.4 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -0.3 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a gain of +0.1 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **TZ3.3.2. ROMATSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 3**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net loss from the terminal activity mentioned above (-1.5 M€) and the actual RoE (+0.4 M€), amounts to -1.1 M€ (-10.7% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is negative (-32.7%), compared to the 12.7% planned in the PP.

### **TZ3.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ3.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ3.3.3.2. NOTE 2**
